features: Pure Burgundy Colour with Radiance – Elevate your look with burgundy hair dye permanent for bold shine and lasting confidence. This hair dye permanent burgundy delivers a smooth, rich finish with depth and dimension.
Root Hair Dye with Grey Coverage – Designed for grey coverage hair dye, it’s the perfect hair dye for grey hair women – blending regrowth seamlessly while enhancing your burgundy hair colour.
Smooth, Polished Burgundy Finish – This rich crème formula glides on effortlessly for even colour and a salon-style result—all from the comfort of your home.

Complete Application Kit – Each 2pk set includes 2x pairs of plastic gloves, 2x 40ml developer milk, 2x 40ml colour crème gel – a complete burgundy hair dye permanent solution for seamless, confident colouring.
Elegant Hair Colours for Women – From subtle depth to bold tone, explore distinguished hair colours for women. This permanent hair colour is ideal for those seeking striking, refined hair colours.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Colour, Style & Care – Your At-Home Hair Essentials in One Chic Collection! 2pk Burgundy Hair Dye Add To Basket 2pk Black Hair Dye Buying Options 2pk Mahogany Hair Dye Buying Options Hair Dye Bowl & Brush Kit Add To Basket Pink Hair Towel Wrap Add To Basket 5pk Hair Brush Set Buying Options 2pk Head Lice Combs Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.6 out of 5 stars 6 4.7 out of 5 stars 3 — 4.3 out of 5 stars 137 3.8 out of 5 stars 221 4.4 out of 5 stars 373 4.0 out of 5 stars 81 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 — — £4.89 £ 4 . 89 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 — £4.29 £ 4 . 29 Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact & Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Designed for Grooming ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Home Use Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Gentle on Skin & Hair ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Does this burgundy hair dye cover grey roots effectively? Yes, it's designed for up to 100% grey coverage, helping blend regrowth while enhancing your hair’s deep burgundy tone. Is this permanent burgundy hair dye suitable for at-home use? Absolutely. The 4-step crème formula glides on evenly for professional-looking colour results from the comfort of your home. What hair colours work best as a base for this burgundy dye? This no bleach hair dye works best on light to medium brown bases, adding rich, dimensional burgundy tones with depth and shine. What’s included in the 2-pack permanent hair dye kit? You’ll get 2x colour crème tubes, 2x developer milk bottles, and 2x pairs of gloves – all you need for two complete colour treatments. How long does this burgundy colour last after application? As a permanent hair dye, the colour is designed to stay vibrant for weeks, especially when paired with colour-protect aftercare products.
